0.q: the Ri-12 strain exhibited compromised growth under both high and low salt conditions, along with consistent levels of DtCHDH gene expression and betaine content.

1.q: this study identifies a choline dehydrogenase enzyme, termed DtCHDH, capable of converting choline to betaine aldehyde.

2.q: When the DtGUP1 gene was suppressed (in DtGUP1-E), transgenic D. tertiolecta was unable to take in exogenous glycerol when subjected to 4 M NaCl hyperosmotic shock.
